prompt: Create a realistic candid 35mm film photograph of four adult women posing together in an old classroom, seated close behind wooden school desks in front of tall sunlit windows and gray metal lockers. The mood is casual, like a snapshot taken during a break, with soft natural daylight, slight wide-angle perspective, visible film grain, muted colors, and a slightly messy environment with chairs, bags, notebooks, magazines, plastic water bottles, and stationery scattered on the desks in the foreground. Count the four people from left to right: 1) a woman leaning in with long dark hair, a white short-sleeve crop top with ruffled neckline, and a light blue denim mini skirt, raising one hand near her head; 2) a woman with medium brown hair wearing a fitted pink crop top and a white pleated mini skirt, making a peace sign; 3) a woman with short dark bob hair wearing a pale yellow strapless crop top and a black mini skirt, raising a peace sign behind the group; 4) a woman with hair tied up wearing an open light blue shirt tied at the waist over a low neckline and a white mini skirt, making a peace sign. Pose them shoulder-to-shoulder in a friendly group-photo composition, facing the camera, with their faces intentionally covered by square pixelated mosaic blur blocks for privacy. Use a Japanese schoolroom or clubroom atmosphere, worn wooden desks, metal locker cabinets, large windows with bright overexposed exterior light, realistic skin texture, natural body proportions, casual styling, and an authentic disposable-camera look. Avoid glamour studio lighting; make it feel like an unpolished real-life snapshot.
